text:
claims (derived) 

FILE(S): LT header 
OT header 

VALUES: 0 = Not MH claim 
1 = MH claim 
Null/missing = Source value is missing or unknown 

COMMENT: This variable is derived in the TAF usingICD-9 diagnosis codes 290–302 and 306–319 and ICD-10 
diagnosis codes F01–F09 and F20–F99 to identify mental health-related claims.
